projects.title: Дашборд мониторинга показателей
projects.description: Одностраничное приложение для аналитики, фильтров и работы с графиками в реальном времени.
projects.stack: Vue 3 · Nuxt · Tailwind · REST API · WebSockets

background.image: radial-gradient(circle at 18% 24%, rgba(92, 219, 149, 0.26), transparent 28%), radial-gradient(circle at 84% 12%, rgba(237, 94, 31, 0.2), transparent 26%), linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(17, 21, 27, 0.96), rgba(27, 35, 46, 0.96))

details.summary: A case for a team that needs one screen for metrics, filters, and live updates without reloading the page.
implementation: Built the SPA structure with separated widgets, filters, and API access layer.
Added live updates through WebSockets with REST requests as a fallback.
Handled responsive chart states, empty results, and loading errors.
details.result: The interface became easier to scan: key metrics, filters, and statuses stay in one working context.

projects.title: Модуль CRM для отдела продаж
projects.description: Разработка backend-части и SPA-интерфейса для управления лидами, задачами и оплатами.

background.image: radial-gradient(circle at 82% 18%, rgba(237, 94, 31, 0.28), transparent 30%), radial-gradient(circle at 16% 86%, rgba(144, 113, 99, 0.26), transparent 30%), linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(22, 17, 22, 0.96), rgba(40, 27, 31, 0.96))

details.summary: An internal CRM module for processing leads, assigning tasks, and tracking payments in a sales team.
implementation: Designed roles, access rules, and data visibility scenarios for different employees.
Implemented the Laravel backend API and connected it to the Vue SPA interface.
Added an audit log for important actions: status changes, payments, comments, and tasks.
details.result: The team received a clearer client history and reduced manual work when handing off leads.

projects.title: Личный сайт-портфолио
projects.description: SPA-структура с плавной навигацией, анимациями и цветовой палитрой на киновари и русском зелёном.

background.image: radial-gradient(circle at 24% 20%, rgba(55, 150, 131, 0.34), transparent 30%), radial-gradient(circle at 78% 72%, rgba(92, 219, 149, 0.18), transparent 28%), linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(15, 23, 21, 0.96), rgba(19, 53, 49, 0.96))

details.summary: A personal website where navigation, stack, and projects are collected in a compact SPA without extra screens.
implementation: Built section switching through Pinia and localized JSON content.
Created responsive Tailwind sections with deliberate hover and focus states.
Separated text content from components so cases can be extended without rewriting templates.
details.result: The portfolio is easier to maintain: new projects, tags, descriptions, and backgrounds are added through data.
